content.text:
This is a three-step procedure, so I seed one ledger item per step before starting:

- [ ] Step 1: Bump the version in package.json
- [ ] Step 2: Update the CHANGELOG.md release heading
- [ ] Step 3: Tag the release in git

Now I work each step and mark it complete as it lands.

- [x] Step 1: Bumped the version in package.json (0.4.0 -> 0.4.1).
- [x] Step 2: Updated the CHANGELOG.md release heading to 0.4.1.
- [x] Step 3: Tagged the release in git (v0.4.1).

All three steps complete; the per-step ledger is fully marked off.
